title: Latest News — Barry Gardiner
text_excerpt: Latest News — Barry Gardiner Home About Barry Latest News Barry in Parliament Barry in the Commons Barry in Select Committees All Party Parliamentary Groups Westminster Hall Debates Barry in Brent Barry's views on issues of policy Barry on the media What Barry can help with Archive Barry Gardiner Home About Barry Latest News Barry in Parliament Barry in the Commons Barry in Select Committees All Party Parliamentary Groups Westminster Hall Debates Barry in Brent Barry's views on issues of policy Barry on the media What Barry can help with Archive Palestine Action Hunger Strike A group of prisoners being held on remand for accusations relating to Palestine Action have been on hunger strike since the beginning of November. So far, ministers are refusing to meet with their lawyers. Barry has written to David Lammy, the Secretary of State for Justice, to ensure the human rights of his constituents are protected. Marine policy at Labour Party Conference At the Labour Party Conference in Liverpool at the end of September, Barry met with the Blue Marine Foundation to talk about the government’s approach to fishing, and the need to follow the science on quotas. Letter to the PM about Gazan scholarship students In August, Barry was part of a large group of over 100 MPs who signed a letter to the Prime Minister, urging him to facilitate the evacuation of students from Gaza who have earned scholarships to study in the UK. You can read the letter here. Air India Disaster My deepest condolences to the families whose loved ones have been involved in the horrific crash of AI 171. The Indian Government has set up an Operational Control Room at the Ministry of Civil Aviation to coordinate all details. Contact: 011-24610843 | 9650391859 For any of my constituents who have relatives involved in the disaster and who may require Consular Assistance from the British High Commission in India please email me with full details of your relative, including their address and the assistance required. Please put “Air India Disaster” as the subject reference to your email to ensure my office acts as quickly as possible. You can email me on: barry.gardiner.mp@parliament.uk The UK Foreign Office @FCDOGovUK is working with authorities in India to urgently establish the facts of this disaster and to provide support to those involved. Anybody who requires consular assistance or who has concerns about friends and family should call 020 7008 5000. Back to Top Privacy Policy Contact details All correspondence via Royal Mail should be addressed to Barry Gardiner MP, House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA or email: barry.gardiner.mp@parliament.uk Promoted by Jackie George on behalf of Barry Strachan Gardiner both at Pavitt Hall, Union Road, Wembley HA0 4AU.
